_comment: Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/Micro-laryngeal surgery/ : Micro-laryngeal surgery_Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + Micro-laryngeal surgery_PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Microlaryngeal surgery with or without laser
clinical_indications: Benign vocal fold lesions (e.g., nodules, polyp, cyst, sulcus vocalis)
Vocal fold paralysis, vocal fold scarring, Vocal fold leukoplakia
Early glottic/ supraglottic cancer, Laryngeal stenosis
Evaluation and removal of various lesions of the vocal folds

preauth.label: Clinical notes (detailing signs, symptoms, examination findings, planned line of treatment & advise for admission)
Laryngoscopy findings/Laryngeal electromyography confirming the diagnosis and indication for surgery

claim.label: Post procedure clinical/Intraprocedural photograph of the affected part

ppd_preauth.q: Was the clinical notes and laryngoscopy report indicative of the procedure?

common_queries: Clinical notes and/or laryngoscopy report not indicative of the micro-laryngeal surgery procedure
Clinical notes missing or lacking details of signs, symptoms, examination findings, planned treatment, or advice for admission at pre-authorization
Laryngoscopy findings or Laryngeal electromyography report missing or not confirming diagnosis/indication for surgery at pre-authorization
Post-procedure clinical or intraprocedural photograph of the affected part not submitted

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed for Surgery only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms, examination.
surgical_options: Combination of Cold and Laser Surgery
additional_information.pre_op_preparation: Maximize non-surgical treatments prior to surgery, including smoking cessation, voice therapy, and reflux management.
contraindications: Cervical spinal fixation or any other condition which prevents neck extension
